description_long: This is a crumpled blue snack packet, specifically a KP Original Salted Peanuts bag, with a glossy plastic exterior. The front of the bag prominently displays the large 'KP' logo in gold and white, along with images of peanuts and clear product labeling. The packaging is visibly wrinkled and partially torn, suggesting it has been discarded or emptied. Nutritional information and other product details are printed in white and yellow on the lower portion of the bag. The bag's surface is reflective and smooth, with some areas showing wear and minor tears. The overall shape is irregular due to the crumpling, and the bag appears mostly empty, with some air trapped inside.
description: A crumpled blue plastic KP Original Salted Peanuts bag with a glossy, reflective surface and visible branding. The packaging is wrinkled, partially torn, and appears mostly empty.
description_view_0: The front view shows the KP logo, product name, and images of peanuts clearly on a blue, crumpled plastic bag.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the bag's irregular, compressed shape and the depth of the crumpling, with less visible branding.
description_view_2: The rear angled view shows more of the bag's back and side, with nutritional labeling and additional creases visible.
description_view_3: The edge-on view reveals the hollow, open structure of the bag and the extent of its deformation, with minimal visible text.
attribute_brand_logo: A large 'KP' logo in gold and white is visible on the front center of the bag, surrounded by a blue background.
attribute_flavor_indication: The text 'Original Salted Peanuts' is clearly visible on the front, indicating the flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information is visible in small white and yellow text on the lower front and back of the bag.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A red and yellow circular price graphic is visible near the top left of the front side.
